title: Madam Grundy.
content:
Madam, they say, has lost her way.
         Tell me, has she passed thither?
        Let her alone and she'll come home,
         And bring her tales all with her.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jean Blewett, titled "Madam Grundy.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
